description: Style Note Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. Wear this piece   with leggings and delicate sandals.  Product Details Brown printed kurta with a U-neckline, short sleeves, has side pockets on the front and a vented hem Material and Care Blended fabric Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8&rdquo and chest 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size WS
